text.title: Data Modeling Procedure
text.summary: Step-by-step procedure to apply the data-modeling methodology end-to-end.

step.name: build-glossary
step.action: Lock terms with one-sentence definitions before sketching entities.

step.name: conceptual-pass
step.action: Sketch entities + relationships in business language only; no attributes.
step.decision-gate: If domain expert unavailable, block — conceptual without domain expert is folklore.

step.name: logical-pass
step.action: Add attributes + keys + cardinality; normalise to 3NF; tech-agnostic.

step.name: physical-pass
step.action: Translate to engine-specific types; add NOT NULL / CHECK constraints; foreign keys.

step.name: index-pass
step.action: Add indexes covering top-10 queries; document the (query, index) mapping.
step.decision-gate: If a top-10 query has no covering index, block.
